overall.description: A bus driving simulation showing a first-person view from the driver's seat during heavy rain. The bus travels along wet city streets with active windshield wipers, stops at a bus stop to pick up passengers, and continues through an urban environment with tram tracks and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane arterial road with tram tracks

events.description: passing a red car on the left side of the bus
approaching an intersection with traffic lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving the bus along wet city streets with active windshield wipers, maintaining steady speed through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: metal tram tracks embedded in the road surface running parallel to the bus lane
multi-story concrete residential blocks lining the right side of the street
tall metal street lamps along the sidewalk
deciduous trees with autumn foliage lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a wet multi-lane city street during heavy rain, with windshield wipers sweeping across the view. Tram tracks run down the center of the road, while apartment buildings line the right side. The bus follows a white van through moderate traffic, passing a red car on the left as it approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus stop shelter on city street

events.description: bus comes to a complete stop at the designated bus stop
bus doors open and passengers begin boarding from the shelter
doors close and interior ceiling lights dim as passengers finish boarding

agents.ego_description: stopped at a bus stop with doors open, allowing passengers to board while wipers continue moving

notable_agents.action: passenger waiting at the bus shelter then boarding through the front door
second passenger entering the bus after the first person boards

entered.detail: glass and metal shelter structure with a bench where passengers wait

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls up to a bus stop shelter on the right side of the road. Two passengers are waiting and board the bus through the front door. The interior lights illuminate as the door opens, then dim when the doors close after boarding is complete. The bus remains stationary with wipers active during the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined city street approaching major intersection

events.description: bus accelerates away from the bus stop, resuming normal speed
stopping at a red traffic light behind a large white truck
traffic light turns green and bus proceeds through the intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating from the bus stop and driving through the city, stopping at a red traffic light behind a large truck before proceeding

notable_agents.action: large white truck stopped at the red light directly ahead of the bus

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal showing red then green at the intersection

segments.scene_description: After departing the bus stop, the bus accelerates along the wet road lined with more dense trees. It approaches an intersection and stops behind a large white truck waiting at a red light. When the light changes to green, the bus proceeds through the intersection, continuing past the truck.

events.description: executing a left turn at the intersection onto a narrower street
entering a residential area with parked vehicles lining both sides of the street

agents.ego_description: navigating a left turn at an intersection and proceeding down a residential street lined with parked cars on both sides

entered.detail: smaller multi-story residential apartment blocks with balconies
row of parked vehicles including a red car along the right curb

segments.scene_description: The bus makes a left turn at the intersection, leaving the main road with tram tracks behind. It enters a residential street where cars are parked along both curbs. The surroundings change to smaller residential buildings, and the bus continues driving through the wet neighborhood with wipers still active.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rain-soaked city center before turning into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins by driving along a wet multi-lane street with active windshield wipers, following a white van past apartment buildings and tram tracks. The camera then shifts as the bus pulls over to a stop, where the interior lights flicker during the boarding of two passengers before the vehicle accelerates back into the heavy rain. As the bus proceeds, it passes dense trees and pauses behind a large white truck at a red light before moving forward through the intersection. Finally, the bus makes a left turn away from the tram tracks and enters a residential street lined with parked cars and smaller buildings.
